text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally, it's time for the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stadium is packed with fans eager to witness
Silence Suzuka's prowess on the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unlike the effervescent mood in the stands, the
atmosphere in the prep room is heavy and
somber.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka reveals that her leg has been
hurting. Despite this, she is confident in herself
and pleads for permission to stay in the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The logical thing would be to consider her future
and withdraw her from the race, but I trust her
when she says she can run.
